description_long: This is a tall, narrow cabinet with a rectangular profile and a light beige finish. The front features a single glass-paneled door with three interior shelves visible, ideal for displaying or storing items, and a small drawer at the bottom with a round knob. The sides and back are solid panels, providing structural support and a clean, minimalist appearance. The cabinet stands on four slender legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. The top has a subtle decorative trim, adding a touch of classic style to its otherwise modern design. This piece would be suitable for use in urban environments such as entryways, hallways, or even outdoor covered spaces for organized storage.
description: A tall, narrow beige cabinet with a glass-paneled door, three shelves, and a bottom drawer, standing on four legs. Its clean lines and subtle trim make it suitable for urban storage or display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass-paneled door, three interior shelves, and a bottom drawer with a knob.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a solid, unadorned panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid back panel with no openings or decorative elements.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with a solid panel and a slight hint of the door's edge.
